$description: NEW category. Captures the standalone UI opacity literals currently raw in src/styles.css (0.7, 0.6, 0.5, 0.4) as named tokens by intended usage. Keyframe endpoints (0/1) are animation states, not design tokens, and are intentionally excluded. No --folia-* opacity vars exist yet (CSS adoption pending); these tokens are the new home, not a byte-match of the .folia-root block.
